questions.text: Have you developed new or worsening weakness in an arm or leg?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had a new loss of bowel or bladder control?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had new numbness around the groin, buttocks, or inner thighs?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had a fever or other infection concern while using immune-suppressing treatment?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Do you have spreading redness, warmth, or fever with the wound?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Are you short of breath at rest or unable to speak comfortably because of breathing difficulty?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you or someone close to you noticed new confusion or unusual sleepiness?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you vomited blood or passed black, tar-like stool?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have your eyes or skin become more yellow?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Do you have a fever now or have you had one with new illness symptoms?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had new chest pain or new breathing difficulty?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Do you have foot or leg pain while resting, especially at night?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Do you have a foot or leg sore that is new or not healing?

questions.text: Have you had sudden severe chest, back, or abdominal pain?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had thoughts of harming yourself or that you would be better off dead?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Are you having severe shaking, confusion, hallucinations, or a seizure while cutting down or stopping?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have swallowing or breathing become newly difficult because of muscle weakness?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had new trouble swallowing food or drinks?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had a seizure since the last review?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you been unable to empty your bladder or unable to urinate?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had a sudden loss of vision or a new dark curtain over your vision?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had new episodes of a racing or irregular heartbeat?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Are vomiting or severe illness keeping you from taking your adrenal medicine?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you had new or worsening chest pressure or discomfort?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have you fainted or nearly fainted since the last review?
questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.assessment: Retain as drafted; threshold and local escalation protocol require clinician approval.

questions.text: Have bowel movements become more frequent or contained blood?
